channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Siri AI bloqué en Europe : « c’est le choix d’Apple, et d’Apple seul », tranche Bruxelles
item.description: Au lendemain de l'annonce d'Apple, l'Europe réplique : si Siri AI ne sortira pas sur iPhone dans l'UE, c'est « le choix d'Apple, et d'Apple seul ». Une version qui contredit frontalement celle de Cupertino.

item.title: iOS 27 features we didn’t see on stage
item.description: While iOS 27 isn't bringing major changes, it's still got many small features that could improve everyday usage for iPhone users.

item.title: Meta wants to train Americans to build its data centers — and is offering a free 5-week program to teach you everything
item.description: Meta commits $115m funding to upskill American citizens in data center construction roles, promises long-term consideration to broader AI impacts.

item.title: L’iPhone pliant d’Apple se cache dans le code d’iOS 27
item.description: Le code d'iOS 27 contient des références explicites à un écran pliable : foldState, second écran, second capteur. L'iPhone Ultra se confirme pour septembre.

item.title: Square Enix announces Kingdom Hearts 4
item.description: A different kind of Sora is back in the news. Square Enix just teased the long-awaited next entry in the Kingdom Hearts series, though there's not much in the way of info just yet. It's called Kingdom Hearts IV and it's launching on the Switch 2, PS5, Xbox, and PC, but there's no release date […]

item.title: La nostalgie de Guitar Hero est de retour à prix bas avec cette offre sur la guitare sans fil Riffmaster compatible Xbox et PC Windows
item.description: Ergonomique, hautement stylée et bien équipée, la guitare sans fil Riffmaster devrait ravir les nostalgiques de Guitar Hero. Conçue pour les Xbox et PC Windows 10/11, elle est compatible avec le dernier Rock Band et le Fortnite Festival. On la trouve en ce moment à 89 euros au lieu de 149,99 euros.

item.title: The Legend of Zelda: Ocarina of Time remake is real and is coming later this year
item.description: The rumors of an Ocarina of Time remake are true, but we don't know much else yet.

item.title: Meta will use your activity on other websites to personalize your feeds
item.description: Meta is planning to use the data shared by other businesses to personalize your feed and its AI responses. In a blog post on Tuesday, Meta explains that it already uses your off-platform activity, like the games you play or your purchases on other websites, to serve you ads. But now it's expanding the scope […]

item.title: Razer announces the Seiren V3 Pro, its first XLR mic
item.description: A podcast and streaming ready microphone for all skill levels, and yes, it has RGB.

item.title: The Legend of Zelda: Ocarina of Time is getting a remake for the Switch 2
item.description: Nintendo announced a remake of The Legend of Zelda: Ocarina of Time during its Nintendo Direct presentation on Tuesday. It will launch sometime in 2026 on Nintendo Switch 2. More details will be announced "in the future." This new title is the first major release in the franchise since 2024's Echoes of Wisdom, which starred […]

item.title: Apple brings streaming-style subscription bundles to the App Store
item.description: Apple is expanding its App Bundles feature to allow developers to partner with one another on discounted subscription packages.

item.title: Microsoft AI chief walks back comments about AI taking over white-collar work
item.description: Microsoft AI head Mustafa Suleyman is walking back his statement about AI automating jobs done by white-collar workers, including lawyers, accountants, and project managers. During an episode of Decoder on Monday, Suleyman says he meant AI will help these workers complete tasks, rather than do their jobs: Sending an email, having a conversation with a […]...

item.title: Pokémon Pokopia is getting underwater mechanics and a bunch of paid DLC
item.description: A free Pokémon Pokopia update arrives in August.

item.title: AI agents are being deployed – but not to full effect
item.description: Aaron Perrott explores how UK enterprises can get the most from their AI agent deployments.

item.title: Test cedric
item.description: Ce 9 juin 2026, des clients du Crédit Agricole ont reçu une notification « Test cedric » sur l'appli Ma Banque, suivie de pannes de connexion. Pas de piratage : juste un test technique parti en vrille.

item.title: Switch 2 exclusive Orbitals arrives September 3
item.description: Orbitals has been in the works for a while, but it finally hits Switch 2 in September.

item.title: The Bear season 5 finally has a trailer — and it could be the Hulu show's most stressful chapter yet
item.description: The Bear season 5 has a gripping new trailer that follows the aftermath of Carmy's retirement.

item.title: Fire Emblem: Fortune's Weave hits Switch 2 on September 17
item.description: Fire Emblem: Fortune's Weave is yet another big game coming out during an absolutely stacked September.

item.title: Engadget Podcast: Recapping Apple's Siri AI WWDC 2026 keynote
item.description: Will Siri AI actually be useful, or is it more AI marketing fluff? We chat about that, and everything else Apple announced at its WWDC 2026 keynote, on the Engadget Podcast.

item.title: Android Auto corrige les bugs qui gâchent vos trajets, à temps pour les vacances
item.description: Connexions qui sautent, appairage qui échoue, lancement automatique aux abonnés absents : les galères de connexion d'Android Auto traînent depuis le début de l'année. Google promet une nouvelle salve de correctifs, en espérant que ce soit la bonne.

item.title: Apple’s App Store rolls out personalized recommendations
item.description: Apple will now recommend apps based on your downloads and behavior.

item.title: À 8,99 euros, ce forfait mobile aligne autant de data que des offres deux fois plus chères
item.description: À 8,99 euros par mois, ce forfait Lebara aligne 250 Go en 5G sur le réseau de SFR, sans engagement. Une enveloppe de données rare à ce tarif, qui en fait l'une des offres les plus généreuses du moment pour un usage en France.

item.title: Denza Z9GT : la concurrente de Porsche signée BYD montre quelques faiblesses à très haute vitesse
item.description: Suite à l'ouverture d'un showroom à Hambourg, en Allemagne, Denza, la marque haut de gamme liée à BYD, a mis à disposition des Z9GT pour certains journalistes, mais un bref passage sur autobahn, les fameuses autoroutes à vitesse illimitée en Allemagne, a suffi à faire lever quelques doutes.

item.title: Microsoft disables over 70 GitHub repos after hackers compromised them with dangerous malware
item.description: Some repos are already restored.

item.title: Apple’s AI promises are finally, almost, sort of, here
item.description: Apple kicked off its annual developer conference with bold promises about AI. The company, CEO Tim Cook said, would be "introducing new technologies and innovations that push the limits on what's possible." But its slew of announcements - centered on a brand-new "Siri AI" - had more to do with catching up. After almost entirely […]

item.title: Uplift Clarksville review: A simple, subtle office chair built for the workplace
item.description: Uplift's Clarksville is a basic chair with a great price and comfort for those who need solid chairs for offices, conference rooms, coworking hubs and more.

item.title: Windows 11 : supprimer vos fichiers en masse sera bientôt 30 % plus rapide
item.description: Microsoft promet une suppression de fichiers en masse au moins 30 % plus rapide sur Windows 11. Et ce n'est qu'un début : l'explorateur de fichiers, longtemps poussif, passe enfin à la chirurgie.

item.title: The UK is investigating Paramount's takeover of Warner Bros. Discovery
item.description: Paramount's takeover of Warner Bros. Discovery is under scrutiny from the UK government.

item.title: Every World Cup fan deserves a seat. Norton Neo says its free browser is the ticket
item.description: Presented by Norton For 39 days this summer, the planet will be doing roughly the same thing at the same time. The 2026 World Cup spans 104 matches across 16 cities in the United States, Canada, and Mexico, with billions of people likely to watch over the course of the tournament. It could very well be one of the largest shared events the internet has ever been asked to carry. What’s changed since the last tournament isn’t the scale, it’s the screen. For a growing share of that audience, the match won’t come through television. It’ll come through a browser tab. The problem is the browser you h...

item.title: Everything you need to know about Prime Day 2026
item.description: Amazon Prime Day 2026 is getting closer, and it’s possible you might have some questions about the sale. When does it start? Why is it in June instead of July? And, most importantly, when will the deals go live? We have concrete answers to those questions, and we’ll have a lot more Prime Day coverage […]

item.title: How to watch Queen's Club Championships 2026: FREE live streams & TV channels for ATP & WTA 500 tennis
item.description: All the ways to watch Queen's Club Championships 2026 live streams – including for FREE – featuring Emma Raducanu, Alexandra Eala and Serena Williams' return.

item.title: Silent Hill Townfall brings atmospheric horror to '90s Scotland with incredible attention to detail
item.description: When you're running footage through a CRTV for authentic static, that's attention to detail.

item.title: Nest Mini and Nest Audio speakers are mysteriously vanishing from the shelves, and I'm convinced the new Google Home Speaker is arriving soon
item.description: Google has wiped the Nest Mini and Nest Audio speakers from its online store, meaning its new smart speaker could be imminent.

item.title: Sandstone raises $30M to bring AI to in-house legal teams
item.description: Sandstone's Series A was led by Lightspeed Partners, with participation from Sequoia.

item.title: Apple’s WWDC upgrades might protect your phone — this VPN deal will secure your connection
item.description: Apple is always keen to let you know about its privacy and security tools, but it’s still worth protecting your device with this VPN deal

item.title: Ce composant qui vaut 40 % de la batterie de votre voiture électrique sera enfin “Made in France”
item.description: Un pas important pour la filière du stockage énergétique en France et en Europe. L’Hexagone a débuté la construction de sa première usine de matériaux actifs de cathode pour batteries de véhicules électriques. Un projet qui devrait permettre d’approvisionner jusqu’à 500 000 véhicules par an.

item.title: Brother MFC-L8970CDW color laser printer review: A downsized, upgraded spin on the company's best enterprise printer
item.description: A smaller, but better flagship for Brother’s Workhorse laser line.

item.title: Nintendo Direct June 2026: All the news and trailers
item.description: After a week of video game news and trailers from PlayStation, Xbox, and most of the major publishers, Nintendo decided to follow things up with its next Nintendo Direct. And it came at an important moment for the company: the Switch 2 is getting a price hike, and at the same time, the console’s lineup […]

item.title: J’ai testé un PC portable gaming avec deux écrans : voici le Asus ROG Zephyrus Duo
item.description: Si vous cherchez la configuration ultime pour un télétravail hyper efficace en étant créatif ou gamer, le Zephyrus Duo remplit cette niche parfaitement. Du moins, pour ceux pouvant se l'offrir.

item.title: Apple’s best AI idea looks a lot like vibe coding
item.description: Most of Apple's current AI ideas are roughly the same as everyone else's AI ideas. A chatbot you can ask questions; quick ways to create or summarize text; bizarre, borderline creepy image-generation tools. The company spent most of its WWDC keynote playing catch-up with the state of the AI art, announcing Siri features you can […]

item.title: Siri AI bloqué en Europe : Apple attaque Bruxelles, mais qui a vraiment raison ?
item.description: Apple accuse le DMA de bloquer Siri AI en Europe. Bruxelles répond que c'est « l'entière responsabilité d'Apple ». On démêle les arguments des deux camps.

item.title: iOS 27 beta has arrived: Here's how to get it on your iPhone
item.description: Beta versions of iOS, iPadOS and watchOS are available to download if you have a developer account.

item.title: L’incroyable supercherie derrière la batterie solide européenne « révolutionnaire » du CES révélée par une vaste enquête
item.description: Au CES 2026, Donut Lab a présenté une batterie solide vendue comme révolutionnaire à plus d'un titre, promettant des autonomies et des durées de vie encore jamais vues. Les doutes s'accumulaient depuis, et une enquête indépendante révèle la supercherie : la prétendue batterie solide n'est qu'une batterie traditionnelle.

item.title: Update Chrome now — Google patches new zero-day flaw already being exploited
item.description: A new bug was found, allowing crooks to execute arbitrary code and possibly steal sensitive files.

item.title: Longevity Startup Doses First Human in Bid to Reverse Age-Related Sight Loss
item.description: It will be the first time ER-100 technology they claim can reverse aging in cells has been tested on a human.

item.title: Garmin Forerunner 265 : cette montre adorée des runneurs (notée 8/10) est en cours de déstockage
item.description: Lancée à 499 euros, l'excellente Garmin Forerunner 265 voit son prix s'effondrer à seulement 237,62 euros. Cette montre de sport premium reste une référence absolue grâce à son superbe écran AMOLED, ses métriques d’entraînement ultra-complètes et sa précision GPS.

item.title: How to watch World Cup 2026 in Spanish
item.description: Whether you're a native speaker or a football hipster looking to add depth to your Copa Mundial experience, here's how to watch World Cup 2026 in Spanish.

item.title: Vous passez plus de temps devant YouTube que Netflix chaque jour, une première
item.description: YouTube vient de dépasser Netflix sur le temps moyen de visionnage quotidien. Une nouvelle première place pour la plateforme face à sa concurrente.
